name: Standard Chartered Rewards Credit Card

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per calendar quarter

exclusions: bonus rewards capped at 2000 reward points per statement cycle
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversal on spends of INR 1,50,000 or more in the previous year
4,000 reward points on payment of annual fee if reversal condition is not met
additionalBenefits: 4 reward points per INR 150 on retail spends
Additional 4 reward points per INR 150 on monthly retail spends above INR 20,000
1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per calendar quarter
No joining fee for new customers

salaried: Applicant age should be between 18 and 65 years
selfEmployed: Applicant age should be between 18 and 67 years
